allow: Bash(python -m pip install --upgrade pip && pip install playwright && playwright install)

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
from pathlib import Path
import inspect

# Check the signature of read_bytes\(\)
sig = inspect.signature\(Path.read_bytes\)
print\("Path.read_bytes\(\) signature:", sig\)

# Try to demonstrate the bug
import tempfile
with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile\(delete=False, suffix=".pdf"\) as tmp:
    tmp.write\(b"%PDF-1.4\\ntest content"\)
    tmp_path = tmp.name

p = Path\(tmp_path\)
try:
    result = p.read_bytes\(4\)
    print\("read_bytes\(4\) returned:", result\)
except TypeError as e:
    print\("ERROR: read_bytes\(4\) raised TypeError:", e\)

# Show what read_bytes\(\) actually does
result = p.read_bytes\(\)
print\("read_bytes\(\) returned \(first 20 bytes\):", result[:20]\)

Path\(tmp_path\).unlink\(\)
EOF)
Bash(python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; import inspect; print\(inspect.signature\(Path.read_bytes\)\)")
